case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CRISTOBAL ANTONIO AVENDANO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT CRISTOBAL ANTIONIO AVENDANO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVENDANO, CRISTOBAL ANTONIO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-03-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AVENDANO, CRISTOBAL ANTONIO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AVENDANO, CRISTOBAL ANTONIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AVENDANO, CRISTOBAL ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,677.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AVENDANO, CRISTOBAL ANTONIO
